description_long: This is a stout, wooden barrel with a classic, slightly bulging cylindrical shape and reinforced by three wide, dark metal hoops encircling its body. The wood staves are vertically aligned, showing a natural brown grain with subtle weathering and stains, suggesting age and outdoor exposure. The top and bottom are flat and slightly recessed, with the top surface appearing solid and closed. The metal bands are matte and show signs of oxidation, giving the barrel a rugged, utilitarian look. There are no visible handles, spouts, or decorative markings, emphasizing its functional design. The overall construction suggests it is intended for storage or transport of bulk materials in urban or industrial settings.
description: A weathered wooden barrel with three dark metal hoops, bulging sides, and a closed top, showing signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view of the barrel showing the bulging sides, three metal hoops, and a flat, closed top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the staves and the texture of the metal bands.
description_view_2: Another angled view showing the wood grain and the even spacing of the metal hoops.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to the front, with visible wood texture and all three metal bands.
